Idioma.MSG_MarqueUnoOMasRegistrosParaRealizarEs: Mark one, or more registrations, to realize this action.
Idioma.MSG_ParaPoderFinalizarNoDebeExistirNingu: To be able to finalize, no pending registration should exist.
Idioma.MSG_DeseaEstablecerComoPagadosLosRegistr: Do you desires to establish as payed the registrations marked?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaEstablecerComoRechazadosLosRegi: Do you desires to establish as rejected the registrations marked?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaEstablecerComoPendientesLosRegi: Do you desires to establish as pending the registrations marked?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaFinalizarElRegistroDePagoDeEsta: Do you desires to finalize the registration of payment of this payroll?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaMarcarComoPagadosLosRegistrosPe: Do you desires to mark as payed the pending registrations?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaMarcarComoRechazadosLosRegistro: Do you desires to mark as rejected the pending registrations?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaMarcarComoPendientesTodosLosReg: Do you desires to mark as pending all the registrations of this Payroll?
Idioma.LB_EnviarBoletasDePagoPorCorreo: Sending receipt of payment by mail
Idioma.LB_EnviarNotificacionDePagoMedianteSMS: Send notification of payment by SMS
Idioma.AYUDA_MarcarComoPagadosTodosLosRegistros: Marking as full all the registrations. It would put state of full to all the registrations pertaining to this payroll.
Idioma.LB_MarcarComoRechazadosTodosLosRegistros: Marking as rejected all the registrations. It would put state of rejected to all the registrations pertaining to this payroll.
